response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems work; their background is heavily weighted toward JavaScript/TypeScript, web apps, and open-source GIS tools, with only brief, non-leading C++ exposure in early roles and no evidence of cloud platform leadership or mentoring in cloud/DevOps contexts.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Experience with CI/CD, testing frameworks, and dev-ops tooling
concerns: Less than 2 years of documented C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum
No demonstrable leadership of cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
Absence of formal technical leadership roles mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
